traits.name: Fey Ancestry.
traits.text: The proto-fey is immune to magical sleep, and has advantage on saving throws versus becoming charmed.

actions.name: Multiattack.
actions.text: The proto-fey makes two attacks with its weapon.

bonus.name: Cunning Action.
bonus.text: The proto-fey can take the move, disengage, or hide action as a bonus action.

reactions.name: Quick-Wit
reactions.text: When a creature that the proto-fey can see that can hear it misses an attack targeting it, the proto-fey can hurl a magical insult at it as a reaction, dealing 1d4 psychic damage.

slots.label: At Will
slots.spells: fire bolt, vicious mockery, dancing lights
